examples: "Where do you get this stuff?" asks Leroy. "From your pappy?"
But I'm most proud of my pappy.
In fact one of the best Manhattans I ever had was made with now defunct Pappy Van Winkle 23-year-old bourbon.
Claudia O'Doherty, Doctor Brown, James Acaster, Pappy's and Tony Law are also nominated for the award, now in its 32nd year.
